reference: I SOUGHT OUT AND PUT INTO HIS HANDS TWO OF MILICENT'S LETTERS ONE DATED FROM LONDON AND WRITTEN DURING ONE OF HIS WILDEST SEASONS OF RECKLESS DISSIPATION THE OTHER IN THE COUNTRY DURING A LUCID INTERVAL
text: I saw Houghton put into his hands two of Millicent's letters, one dated from London and written during one of his wildest seasons of reckless dissipation, the other in the country, during a lucid interval.
